name: Guns & Gold Pawn, LLC.
description_short: Grand Prairie, TX pawn shop offering pawn loans, firearm sales, FFL transfers, and gold and jewelry buying. Rated 5.0/5 stars from 253 Google reviews.
description_long: Guns & Gold Pawn, LLC in Grand Prairie, Texas is an ATF-licensed firearms dealer and full-service pawnbroker operating at 302 E Pioneer Pkwy, Grand Prairie, TX 75051. The business holds an active Federal Firearms License (FFL #5-75-113-02-4H-20108, expiring September 2026), allowing it to legally conduct firearm sales and interstate transfer services. The shop provides a broad range of pawn and retail services. Customers can obtain short-term collateral-based pawn loans by leaving items such as jewelry, electronics, tools, and lawn equipment with the shop. The store also buys and sells used merchandise outright. For firearm enthusiasts, the shop sells new and used guns and serves as an FFL transfer dealer — a critical service for customers who purchase firearms online and need a licensed local dealer to complete the legal transfer paperwork. Gold and jewelry transactions are a core part of the business, consistent with the shop's name. The Grand Prairie location stands out for its exceptional customer satisfaction record. With a 5.0-out-of-5 star rating drawn from 253 Google reviews, it ranks among the most highly rated pawn shops in the Dallas–Fort Worth metro area. The shop also offers notably extended hours compared to many competitors: Monday through Friday 9am–7pm, Saturday 9am–6pm, and Sunday noon–5pm — rare Sunday availability that caters to customers with weekday scheduling constraints. A second address associated with the business (2701 W Pioneer Pkwy, Dalworthington Gardens, TX 76013) suggests possible additional or former operational presence in the area. The shop is a strong option for local consumers needing fast liquidity through collateral loans or looking to buy, sell, or transfer firearms legally. Its primary limitation is the absence of a public-facing website, which prevents customers from browsing inventory or researching pawn loan rates before visiting. Loan interest rates are set by Texas state regulation and are not publicly advertised, so borrowers must inquire in person. No BBB listing was found for this specific Texas location, so third-party complaint history is not readily available. Customers searching online should take care to distinguish this Grand Prairie business from the similarly named but unrelated Arizona and Georgia entities.
address: 302 E Pioneer Pkwy, Grand Prairie, TX 75051
pros: Perfect 5.0/5 Google rating from 253 reviews — one of the highest-rated pawn shops in the DFW area
Open Sundays (noon–5pm), uncommon among pawn shops and useful for customers with weekday scheduling constraints
Extended weekday hours until 7pm Monday–Friday, accommodating working customers
Active ATF Federal Firearms License allows legal new and used firearm sales and online FFL transfers
Accepts diverse collateral categories including jewelry, electronics, tools, and lawn equipment
Serves as a local FFL transfer point for online firearm purchasers — a practical service for gun buyers
Located on E Pioneer Pkwy in Grand Prairie with a second associated address suggesting broad local coverage
cons: No website found — customers cannot browse inventory, check loan rates, or verify current hours online
Pawn loan interest rates are not publicly advertised and must be negotiated in person; Texas rates are state-regulated but vary by transaction
No BBB listing found for this Texas location, so independent complaint history is unavailable
Business name is shared with two unrelated pawn shops in Arizona and Georgia, creating potential confusion for online searchers
No mobile app or online portal for remote account management or loan tracking
best_for: Grand Prairie and DFW-area residents needing a quick collateral-based loan against jewelry, electronics, tools, or other valuables
Firearm buyers and enthusiasts seeking new or used guns from a licensed FFL dealer
Online gun purchasers who need a local licensed FFL dealer to complete a legal transfer from an out-of-state seller
Individuals looking to sell or pawn gold and jewelry for immediate cash
diagnosis: Guns & Gold Pawn in Grand Prairie, TX is best suited for local consumers seeking fast cash through pawn loans or looking to buy and sell firearms, gold, and general merchandise from a highly rated, ATF-licensed shop with convenient extended hours. The main caveat is the lack of any web presence, meaning all transactions and rate inquiries must be conducted in person with no way to pre-verify inventory or loan terms online.
services: FFL transfer services for online firearm purchases
